cases.task: Pick up the permanent magnet ingot from the conveyor belt with right arm.
Stretch the sleeve of the garment with the left arm.
Pick up the black frying pan in the sink with left arm.
Place the held hand cream in the drawer with the right arm.
Pick up the small pack of black tissues on the table with the right arm.
Dip the tea bag into the cup and lift it out.
Place the bottled chewing gum held in the left arm into the green felt bag on the left side of the cash register.
Grip the right arm and pull the zipper.
